positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a celestial forest meeting a cosmic ocean. Focus on giant, bioluminescent flora casting an ethereal glow against deep indigo and sapphire hues. The foreground features stylized, interconnected root systems forming natural pathways. In the middle ground, stylized, geometric-patterned floating islands drift among waterfalls that flow into the cosmic sea. The overall style is neo-whimsical, highly detailed linework reminiscent of Art Nouveau fused with modern synthwave aesthetics. Use strong chiaroscuro lighting to emphasize glowing accents and silhouettes. Composition must be centralized and circular, making the scene look perfect printed on a t-shirt or tote bag. Clean vector lines, graphic illustration, high contrast, flat color blocking with subtle gradient depth, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, ugly, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic, photograph, logo, trademark, copyright, celebrity
